productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Pant Climalite Blue Track Pants
description: CompositionDark teal blue track pants made of 100% polyester Climalite fabric, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, mesh lining, insert pockets on the sides with zippered closures, brand name printed on the left leg and contoured side seams with turquoise blue panel detailingFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 30 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoLook cool while working out in these teal blue tracks from adidas. The printed logo on the left leg increases the brand appeal, while the turquoise blue, contoured panels gives a dose of fierce energy. The Climalite fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long by drawing sweat away from the body and the mesh lining keeps your skin dry. Team it with vests and performance shoes for sporting activities. Model statisticsThe model wears track pants of length 42"Height-6'   Waist-32"
